inputs.label: Byte Count
inputs.businessContext: Total number of bytes to be encoded

inputs.label: ASCII Character Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of characters that are ASCII (1 byte each)

inputs.label: 2-Byte Character Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of characters that require 2 bytes (e.g., Latin extended)

inputs.label: 3-Byte Character Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of characters that require 3 bytes (e.g., CJK)

inputs.label: 4-Byte Character Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of characters that require 4 bytes (e.g., emoji)

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Additional overhead for BOM or metadata
